seoTitle: How to Use Canned Responses in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to insert canned responses in Freshdesk to reply to repetitive customer questions quickly and consistently.
intro: Canned responses let agents drop in pre-written answers instead of typing the same reply over and over. This guide covers how to use them while working a ticket in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open a ticket you're replying to
steps.body: Go into the ticket where you want to send a quick, pre-written reply.

steps.heading: Open the canned response menu
steps.body: Look for the canned response icon or option within the reply editor.

steps.heading: Select the right response
steps.body: Search or browse through available canned responses to find the one that fits the situation.

steps.heading: Insert and personalize
steps.body: Insert the response into your reply and adjust any details specific to the customer before sending.

faq.question: How is a canned response different from a template?
faq.answer: Canned responses and templates serve similar purposes, though canned responses are often quicker snippets inserted directly during a reply.

faq.question: Can I edit a canned response before sending?
faq.answer: Yes, once inserted you can freely edit the text to personalize it before sending your reply.

faq.question: Who creates canned responses?
faq.answer: Admins typically set up the initial library, though some plans let individual agents create their own.

faq.question: Can canned responses include attachments?
faq.answer: Depending on your Freshdesk setup, canned responses can sometimes include standard attachments alongside the text.
